reviews.comment:
Todo ok solo que al querer abonar con previaje la tarjeta dio denegada cuando en otro local a los 5 minutos paso sin problema.

(Translated by Google)
Everything was fine, except that when I tried to pay in advance, the card was denied, but at another location, it went through without any problem 5 minutes later.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13734748019616020928/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXdGM3NnhnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Estuvimos cargando combustible y comprando agua. Había cola de vehículos. Había un solo empleado para atender a todos, y atendia también la venta de agua y gaseosas, pobre, no daba abasto. Hasta se disculpó conmigo que estaba comprando agua por su demora, y no se demoró prácticamente nada. Aplaudo a ese empleado. Y los que manejan esa estación de servicio tendrían que poner personas que lo ayuden

(Translated by Google)
We were filling up with gas and buying water. There was a line of vehicles. There was only one employee to serve everyone, and he also sold water and soda. Poor thing, he couldn't keep up. He even apologized to me, who was buying water, for being late, and he was practically in no time at all. I applaud that employee. And those who run that gas station should hire people to help him.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias Marcela por su tiempo y sugerencia

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13734748019616020928/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXMlpIejl3RRAB
